title: [UI Kit] Date Picker component
verdict_reason: Original blocking bug (typing 0 clears native input) is FIXED. New components render and function correctly across primary surfaces. 6 open defects (3 from 2026-05-22 + 3 from 2026-05-26 augmentation; NEW-4 withdrawn 2026-05-26 after source-verification — see WITHDRAWN entry below): 4 P1 (NEW-1, NEW-2, NEW-3, BUG-1 Escape) and 2 Medium (BUG-2 reversed range, BUG-3 back-nav). Coverage improved from ~50 untested items to ~4; the false-BLOCKED Storybook session was resolved by switching from Chrome DevTools MCP to playwright-firefox.
agents_dispatched: ui-ux-expert on playwright-firefox (gap coverage retest, success) — 2026-05-26
business_rules_verified: BL-UI-001 (no CLS on popover open — confirmed via snapshot)
BL-UI-003 (state shift — popover open/close behavior consistent)
BL-UI-004 (overflow — sizes xs/sm/md render without overflow)
BL-UI-006 (touch targets — FAIL on /account/orders mobile date inputs at 36px; pre-existing)

ac_coverage.AC-1_on_change_payload: Partial — payload structure verified indirectly via C-9 updateOn=enter commit timing; A-8 explicit inspection not executed (time budget).
ac_coverage.AC-2_typing_zero_does_not_clear: PASS — verified manually (A-5 in VcDateInput default story).
ac_coverage.AC-3_no_eager_request_per_keystroke: PASS — verified at two layers: (a) Storybook updateOn=blur holds value until blur; (b) /account/orders shows 0 fetches across 20 keystrokes, then 1 fetch on Apply.

defects.title: VcDatePicker popover does not close on Escape key
defects.repro: Storybook iframe.html?id=components-organisms-vcdatepicker--default → click Open calendar → press Escape → popover remains open

defects.title: Reversed date range fires malformed Lucene GraphQL filter (End term dropped)
defects.cross_browser_confirmed: 2026-05-26 — Chrome (REG-2026-05-26-1530 / ORD-054) and Firefox (manual second-source) both produce byte-identical createddate:["...Z" TO] payload
defects.status: OPEN — local bug report written, JIRA comment 98675 already posted to VCST-4892 with full RCA
defects.rca: useUserOrders.ts:80-93 getFilterExpression() — toEndDateFilterValue(filterData.endDate) likely returns undefined when End < Start; the conditional `if (endDateFilterValue)` then skips the upper bound entirely. Apply button is dirty-state-gated, not validity-gated.

defects.title: Date filter state lost on browser-back navigation
defects.repro: /account/orders → apply date range → click an order → browser back → date filter state cleared

defects.title: VcCalendar: Home/End keys non-functional in calendar grid
defects.repro: Storybook iframe.html?id=components-molecules-vccalendar--default → tab into calendar → focus a day → press Home → focus does not move to first day of week. Same for End.

defects.title: VcCalendar: PgUp/PgDn/Ctrl+PgUp non-functional
defects.repro: Same story → focus a day → press PgUp/PgDn/Ctrl+PgUp/Ctrl+PgDn → no month/year change

defects.title: VcDateInput: aria-expanded disallowed on <input type="text">
defects.wcag: WCAG 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (axe-core critical, aria-allowed-attr)
defects.fix_direction: Add role="combobox" to the input (permits aria-expanded) OR move aria-expanded to the trigger button

defects.title: VcDateSelector: deprecation console.warn does not fire on mount
defects.status: WITHDRAWN 2026-05-26 — source at PR head fed4fe16 (vc-date-selector.vue ~lines 88-90) DOES contain the component-level console.warn per DEPRECATION.md step 4; the warn is gated by import.meta.env.DEV which is false in Storybook's production build. Warn fires correctly in a real `npm run dev` session. Storybook is not the right surface to test dev-only warns.

additional_observations: i18n Section G claim about ru/sv/zh missing is OVERSTATED — calendar renders Cyrillic month/weekday names correctly via browser Intl (verified G-4 PASS on 2026-05-26). Only 'Previous year/month' nav button accessible names remain in English in non-en locales.

Maya's original Reka UI plan was NOT followed — implementation is hand-rolled (use-calendar-base.ts + vc-calendar.vue, 575 lines combined). The hand-rolled accessibility shows in the C-2 Escape bug and NEW-1/NEW-2 keyboard navigation gaps.
Default theme has known a11y gaps (selected-day contrast 2.11:1, transparent focus ring) — these are pre-existing per `feedback_a11y_coffee_only` memory; Coffee is QA standard.

False-BLOCKED storybook-execution-report from 2026-05-22 was due to Chrome DevTools MCP tooling, NOT VCST-4892 components. Resolved by re-dispatching ui-ux-expert on playwright-firefox in the 2026-05-26 augmentation session.

notable_gaps: A-2 de/fi locale parsing — no Storybook story exists
A-8 @change payload structure explicit inspection — covered indirectly by C-9
C-10 updateOn=submit — no Storybook story; verify in production form context
F-3 deprecation warn fires once — N/A until F-2 resolved
untested_carried_forward.recommendation: Cover A-2 by adding de/fi locale stories. A-8 covered by unit tests. C-10 will surface in real form usage. F-3 blocked on F-2.
